src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate the import statement for the Generated annotation from the javax package to the jakarta package to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by newer Spring Boot versions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x, causing a compile error 'package javax.annotation does not exist' if not migrated.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.annotation does not exist' on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Fix invalid escape sequence in string literal to comply with stricter Java compiler rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compile error: invalid escape sequence '\'' in string literal (Java 17 compiler is stricter about unrecognized escape sequences than older versions).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace the Hibernate 5 Jackson module with the Jakarta EE namespace variant to support the migration from javax to jakarta packages.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The original Hibernate5Module relies on javax.persistence classes which are removed or relocated in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; using the old module causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime on JDK 17 with Jakarta dependencies.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Reorder method parameters to place the custom @LiquibaseDataSource provider after standard properties, likely to resolve Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE namespace conflicts or dependency injection ordering issues.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 (JDK 17+) may fail to inject the custom @LiquibaseDataSource bean correctly if the parameter order conflicts with default resolution strategies or if the annotation processing order changed in the newer Spring Framework version.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated setLabels method with setLabelFilter to align with updated LiquibaseProperties API in newer Spring Boot versions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The setLabels method is removed or deprecated in the newer Spring Boot/Liquibase integration; calling it causes a compile error or runtime NoSuchMethodError.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6.0; extending it causes compilation errors or severe deprecation warnings in modern Spring Boot 3.x environments.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 5.7+ method security configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it prevents compilation in Spring Boot 3.x.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from imperative style (and() chains) to lambda DSL required by Spring Security 5.7+.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The imperative configure(HttpSecurity) method and and() chaining are removed in Spring Security 6.0; code fails to compile without migrating to the lambda-based DSL.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace antMatchers with requestMatchers in authorization rules to comply with Spring Security 6.0 API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace authorizeRequests with authorizeHttpRequests to comply with Spring Security 6.0 API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: authorizeRequests is removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated featurePolicy with permissionsPolicy in header configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: featurePolicy is deprecated and removed in newer Spring Security versions; using it causes compilation errors or runtime failures.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom JWT configurer with standard OAuth2 Resource Server JWT configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Custom JWT configurers often rely on deprecated or removed internal APIs; migrating to standard OAuth2ResourceServer is required for compatibility with Spring Security 6.0.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom SecurityProblemSupport exception handling with standard BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Custom exception handlers may rely on deprecated APIs; standard handlers are required for proper OAuth2/JWT error responses in Spring Security 6.0.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused imports related to the old WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter and custom JWT configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Unused imports from removed classes cause compilation errors if the classes are no longer present or imported.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add new imports for SecurityFilterChain, OAuth2 handlers, and JHipster properties required by the new configuration style.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Missing imports for new classes cause compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor constructor to inject JHipsterProperties instead of TokenProvider, CorsFilter, and SecurityProblemSupport.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old dependencies are no longer used in the new configuration style; keeping them causes unused field warnings or compilation errors if the beans are removed.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: public SecurityConfiguration(TokenProvider tokenProvider, CorsFilter corsFilter, SecurityProblemSupport problemSupport)

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove configure(WebSecurity) method and move ignored paths to SecurityFilterChain.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The configure(WebSecurity) method is part of the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter; it must be removed or migrated to the new SecurityFilterChain bean.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+/Spring Boot 3, causing compilation errors due to missing packages.
